mapper.select: SELECT * FROM child_diary WHERE ch_seq = #{childId} AND (delete_yn IS NULL OR delete_yn != 'Y') ORDER BY di_date DESC, di_time DESC
SELECT * FROM child_diary WHERE di_seq = #{diSeq} AND (delete_yn IS NULL OR delete_yn != 'Y')

SELECT i.cc_di_seq AS item_id, i.cc_di_div AS item_division, i.cc_di_code AS item_code, i.cc_di_name AS item_name, i.cc_di_unit AS unit, SUM(CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(d.amount, ''), '0') AS DECIMAL)) AS total_amount, COUNT(*) AS count FROM child_diary d JOIN cc_diary_item i ON d.cc_di_seq = i.cc_di_seq WHERE d.ch_seq = #{childId} AND d.di_date = #{diDate} AND (d.delete_yn IS NULL OR d.delete_yn != 'Y') GROUP BY i.cc_di_seq, i.cc_di_div, i.cc_di_code, i.cc_di_name, i.cc_di_unit ORDER BY i.cc_di_seq

SELECT i.cc_di_seq AS item_id, i.cc_di_div AS item_division, i.cc_di_code AS item_code, i.cc_di_name AS item_name, i.cc_di_unit AS unit, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(COALESCE(NULLIF(d.amount, ''), '0') AS DECIMAL)), 0) AS total_amount, COALESCE(COUNT(d.di_seq), 0) AS count FROM cc_diary_item i LEFT JOIN child_diary d ON i.cc_di_seq = d.cc_di_seq AND d.ch_seq = #{childId} AND d.di_date = #{diDate} AND (d.delete_yn IS NULL OR d.delete_yn != 'Y') WHERE i.cc_di_div = #{division} AND (i.delete_yn IS NULL OR i.delete_yn != 'Y') GROUP BY i.cc_di_seq, i.cc_di_div, i.cc_di_code, i.cc_di_name, i.cc_di_unit ORDER BY i.cc_di_seq
SELECT * FROM cc_diary_item WHERE delete_yn IS NULL OR delete_yn != 'Y'
SELECT * FROM cc_diary_item WHERE cc_di_div = #{division} AND (delete_yn IS NULL OR delete_yn != 'Y')
